description_long: This is a life-sized cow with a robust, muscular build and a predominantly reddish-brown coat accented by large, irregular white patches. Its head is broad and white, with a pair of pointed, outward-curving horns and large, expressive eyes. The ears are medium-sized, slightly pointed, and project outward from the sides of the head. The cow's udder is visible and well-defined, hanging between its hind legs, and its tail is long and slender, ending in a tuft of hair. The legs are sturdy and proportionate, with white markings on the lower portions. The overall appearance is healthy and typical of a dairy or beef breed commonly seen in rural and urban fringe environments.
description: A robust, reddish-brown and white cow with prominent horns, a visible udder, and a distinctive coat pattern. The animal has a strong build, expressive features, and a long tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad white face, both horns, and the cow's symmetrical stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, white underbelly, and the full profile of the head and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail hanging down, visible udder, and the symmetry of the hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body length, head profile, and leg positioning.
attribute_ear_shape: The ears are medium-sized, slightly pointed at the tips, and extend outward from the sides of the head with a gentle curve. They have a soft, fleshy appearance and are covered in short hair.
attribute_pattern_distinctiveness: The cow's coat pattern is highly distinctive, with bold, irregular white patches sharply contrasting against the rich reddish-brown background. The markings are clear and well-defined, giving the animal a unique and easily recognizable appearance.
